requirements.text: Configuration MUST be externalised (env vars or config files); no hardcoded env-specific values
Feature toggles MUST be used for environment-specific behaviour
Platform-specific code MUST be isolated behind abstraction layers
Locale and timezone MUST NOT be hardcoded; use runtime configuration
Stateless request handling MUST be preferred; session state MUST be externalised
File-based storage MUST be replaceable with distributed alternatives
Database schemas MUST support migration tooling for non-destructive evolution
Work dispatching MUST support horizontal scaling (queue-based or partitioned)
Dependencies MUST be declared in a lockfile with exact versions
Build and run instructions MUST be documented and reproducible
System-level dependencies MUST be declared explicitly (not assumed)
Container images MUST use specific base image tags, not :latest
Components MUST be replaceable without modifying callers (dependency inversion)
Public interfaces MUST be versioned; breaking changes require a major version bump
External service integrations MUST use adapter/wrapper patterns
Data formats MUST be versioned for backward-compatible deserialization
